{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/10426523?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PJUllrich/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PJUllrich/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PJUllrich/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PJUllrich/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/PJUllrich", "id": 10426523, "login": "PJUllrich", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjEwNDI2NTIz", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PJUllrich/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PJUllrich/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PJUllrich/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PJUllrich/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/PJUllrich/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/PJUllrich", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-32689", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "### Summary

An unauthenticated denial-of-service vulnerability in Phoenix's long-poll transport allows a remote client to allocate a large amount of memory with a HTTP request. A handful of concurrent requests can be sufficient to let the node run out of memory.

See also https://cna.erlef.org/cves/CVE-2026-32689.html.

### Details

The unoptimised code path exists on the `application/x-ndjson` POST handling in the LongPoll transport. The endpoint requires only a session token, which any client can obtain by issuing a GET to the same URL with a matching `Origin` header, so exploitation is unauthenticated.

### Impact

Anyone who runs a LiveView app with a public Longpoll socket or uses a `Phoenix.Socket` with longpoll option.
Longpoll has been enabled for newly generated Phoenix projects since Phoenix 1.7.11.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00469, "percentile": 0.375}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-628h-q48j-jr6q", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-08T20:24:15Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-628h-q48j-jr6q", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-628h-q48j-jr6q"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-32689"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-05T16:16:11Z", "published_at": "2026-05-08T20:24:15Z", "references": ["https://github.com/phoenixframework/phoenix/security/advisories/GHSA-628h-q48j-jr6q", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-32689", "https://github.com/phoenixframework/phoenix/commit/1a67c61ff9ce0a7711662ac7354861917a7c80f7", "https://github.com/phoenixframework/phoenix/commit/912ea181fd247c21dbcc49fb97d0053b947d81bf", "https://cna.erlef.org/cves/CVE-2026-32689.html", "https://osv.dev/vulnerability/EEF-CVE-2026-32689", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-628h-q48j-jr6q"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/phoenixframework/phoenix/security-advisories/GHSA-628h-q48j-jr6q", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/phoenixframework/phoenix", "summary": "Phoenix: Long-poll NDJSON body splitting causes large memory allocation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T20:24:16Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-628h-q48j-jr6q", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.7.22", "package": {"ecosystem": "erlang", "name": "phoenix"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.7.0, < 1.7.22"}, {"first_patched_version": "1.8.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "erlang", "name": "phoenix"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.8.0, < 1.8.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Phoenix: Long-poll NDJSON body splitting causes large memory allocation
